chemistry_overall: All candidates show suboptimal conversion (X < 0.85) but are workable with concentration adjustments to improve kinetics. All candidates show insufficient residence time for target kinetics (τ_kinetics=60 min), with candidate 3 blocked due to dual mixing failures and conversion below minimum threshold. All candidates show suboptimal conversion due to insufficient residence time. Candidate 6 has hard-gated mixing failure requiring blocking. All candidates show suboptimal conversion rates below 0.85 target, with candidate 7 performing best at 86.5% conversion despite long tubing length. All candidates show acceptable performance with minor optimization needs for conversion targets. Candidate 14 is hard-gated due to excessive tubing length (42.0 m > 25.0 m bench limit).
